name: Old Style Enchiladas
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Salt and Pepper To Taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2-3 cups of oil in a large skillet.
2. Brown ground beef with 1 chopped onion (add 2 cloves garlic, chopped if desired) until cooked through.
3. Drain the excess fat from the beef mixture.
4. Add canned tomatoes, crushed kidney beans, chili powder, sugar, salt, and pepper to the skillet. Simmer for a few minutes.
5. Heat oil in another large skillet or pan over medium heat.
6. Cook corn tortillas one at a time until soft and slightly browned (about 1-2 minutes per side).
7. Place a tortilla on a plate.
8. Spoon the beef mixture evenly over the tortilla, leaving space for raw onion and cheese.
9. Sprinkle grated cheese and chopped onion on top of the filling.
10. Roll up the tortilla tightly in a seamless roll.
11. Repeat steps 6-10 until all ingredients are used or desired portion size is reached.
12. Serve hot and enjoy your Old Style Enchiladas.
